blended.narrative: Granite Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 407 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect powder.
